nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Band-tailed antbird
nodes.summary: Band-tailed antbird（Band-tailed antbird，学名 Hypocnemoides maculicauda），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The band-tailed antbird (Hypocnemoides maculicauda) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved October 28, 2023 However, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society includes Colombia in the species' range on the basis of a 2020 publication. Xeno-canto has a single song recording from 2022 in extreme southern Colombia. The band-tailed antbird inhabits lowland evergreen forest, almost always in várzea forest along larger rivers, along smaller watercourses, and along the edges of lakes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered locally fairly common overall and fairly common in Peru. "Human activity has little direct effect on the Band-tailed Antbird, other than the local effects of habitat destruction."
